task_completion.description: Open the properties or configuration menu for the existing dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Emoncms dashboard properties modal or configuration page open for the target dashboard.

task_completion.description: Rename the dashboard to 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' input field in the dashboard properties contains exactly 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Set the dashboard description to the required text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' input field contains exactly 'Real-time energy and solar monitoring for Oakwood Plaza retail building'.

task_completion.description: Enable public access for the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Public' checkbox or toggle in the dashboard properties is checked or set to the active/enabled state.
The 'Alias' input field in the dashboard properties contains exactly 'oakwood-plaza'.
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save' button, a success notification, or the main dashboard list reflecting the updated name 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor' and public status.

integrity.description: The agent used the Emoncms web GUI to configure the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the web browser interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL queries or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Emoncms application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a valid local URL for Emoncms, not a local file path or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements tab) should not be open and used to manually edit the DOM text to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dashboard to configure has ID 1 (originally named 'My Dashboard'). The expected configuration values are: Name: 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor', Description: 'Real-time energy and solar monitoring for Oakwood Plaza retail building', Alias (slug): 'oakwood-plaza', and Public access: Enabled (checked/true).
